hero.search_bar: Overlapping bottom edge of the hero, floating glassmorphism

navigation.style: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) on scroll, transparent at top if overlying hero

panic_button.style: Fixed bottom-right floating action button. bg-[#D32F2F] text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-2xl

pueblos_magicos_grid.style: Bento Grid pattern. Asymmetrical. Cards have background images with soft gradient overlays. Gold accent badges (#F9A825).

directory_cards.style: Clean white cards (surface), rounded-2xl, subtle shadow, Poppins font. Badges for verified status.

admin_dashboard.style: Sharp / 8px max radius, dense data layout, solid backgrounds, heavy use of tables and charts, left-aligned standard.

animations.pulse: Use tailwind animate-pulse or a custom ping animation for the panic button

image_urls.description: Close up of traditional Mexican coffee with plantations
Jungle green and Gulf blue abstract gradient

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Add Google Fonts 'Playfair Display' and 'Poppins' via layout or global CSS.
ICONS: Use lucide-react. Ensure to maintain consistency in sizes.
MAP: Integrate the interactive map section (Google Maps integration requested in problem statment).
COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI for dropdowns, inputs, tabs, and administrative tables.
DATA ATTRIBUTES: Ensure all interactive elements include 'data-testid' for testing purposes.
HERO OVERLAY: The hero image requires a bg-black/40 overlay to ensure the Playfair Display headings stand out properly.
PANIC BUTTON: Must be a fixed floating button (e.g. bottom-right), colored #D32F2F with an alert icon, leveraging the pulse animation.
LAYOUT: Adhere to Airbnb/VisitMexico level design using clear Bento Grid patterns for 'Pueblos Magicos' and clean directories for service providers.
